steps.title: Spot the defining claim about their meeting
steps.content: The passage states directly: “who had met while performing in a 1960 touring production of Lorraine Hansberry's play A Raisin in the Sun.”

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly mirrors the passage's account of how they met. The other three either swap in the wrong play, invent a role for Harrison, or misdate the meeting to an era when NEC didn't yet exist. That matches choice D — D is correct.
